title: Context-Bound Approval and Transaction Foundation
description: Provide one reusable fail-closed transaction, approval, journal, receipt, rollback, recovery, and path-coverage foundation for every governed Enki operation.
acceptance_criteria: Approval evaluation binds execution context, action, subject, content hash, authority, validity, revocation, and transaction identity
AVAILABLE, RESERVED, CONSUMED, and REVOKED states are durable and compare-and-swap safe
Interruption before consumption releases reservation and records rollback
Interruption after consumption recovers only through the same exact transaction without duplicate effects
TEST cannot reach production capability and cross-context replay fails closed
Machine-readable path manifests and automated coverage enforce every declared terminal path

evidence.description: Shared governed transaction and path-completeness implementation.
Final transaction and state-write branch CI passed.
